narrative:
Wadsworth City has 16,324 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
